raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "AB 98 implements first-of-its-kind standards to mitigate the impacts of the logistics industry on sensitive receptors.",
    "AB 98 requires a minimum setback between sensitive receptors and the dock bay of a warehouse.",
    "AB 98 mandates that warehouses are built to 21st-century building standards that include investments in renewable energy.",
    "AB 98 requires a buffer of up to 100 feet around logistics facilities.",
    "AB 98 prohibits the dock bay of a warehouse from being adjacent to any sensitive receptor.",
    "AB 98 mandates an update of truck routes throughout California to reduce truck idling.",
    "AB 98 requires that truck routes do not cut through local neighborhoods.",
    "AB 98 necessitates that developers who eliminate housing due to logistics projects must replace housing at a 2:1 ratio in a fund for local affordable units."
  ]
}
```
